### IV. | META-NOTES

Projects may shift modes depending on:
- Format (e.g., audio vs text)
- Entry point (e.g., GitHub vs ARG vs podcast)
- Narrative layer (e.g., surface explanation vs embedded recursion)

We will eventually generate tags and filters for:
- `[LOGIC:REALITY]`, `[LOGIC:DREAM]`, `[LOGIC:HYBRID]`, `[LOGIC:META]`
- For use in docs, GitHub, Notion, mobile exports
